privileged_info_summary: No verified privileged information available. The task.json file contains no 'metadata' field, therefore there are no metadata claims to audit. The spreadsheet data is fully synthetic, generated by Python code in the setup_task.sh script using the odf library. The spreadsheet contains theater ticket revenue calculations with intentional cryptic abbreviations (SR, GEN, STD, COMP, GP, OH, NP, BEP) and a deliberate #REF! error in row 6 column B, created to test the agent's ability to reverse-engineer and document undocumented spreadsheets.
